overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, following a character through neon-lit streets, past towering buildings with digital billboards, and around street corners. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the dense urban environment of Night City with its characteristic neon lighting and high-tech architecture.

events.description: character steps from crosswalk onto concrete sidewalk
character turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk, moving away from the intersection and past digital billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving down the street past the intersection
person in yellow outfit crossing the street ahead of the character

large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
yellow striped pedestrian crossing with green WALK text painted on asphalt
tall modern street light pole with overhead illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a neon-lit intersection at night, with the character standing on a crosswalk marked with green WALK signage. The character walks forward onto the concrete sidewalk, passing a green TRAIN station sign on the right and large digital billboards on the left. A futuristic sedan drives past on the street while another pedestrian crosses ahead, establishing the sparse but active urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers and massive digital advertisements

events.description: passing under bright vertical neon signs increases local illumination and color saturation
approaching the NCPS building corner with police station signage becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking through the urban canyon, passing other pedestrians while surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital screens

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with prominent red neon signage at the top reading FUYUTSUKI
large brutalist concrete building with NCPS signage indicating Night City Police Station
tall building facade covered in multiple stacked digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense urban canyon where towering skyscrapers block most of the sky. The environment is dominated by massive digital billboards and neon signage, including a prominent red FUYUTSUKI sign atop a distant building and the NCPS police station on the right. The lighting shifts as the character passes under brighter neon installations, and other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with outdoor dining and illuminated storefronts

events.description: futuristic boxy SUV with red taillights drives past on the street alongside the character
passing outdoor seating area of a restaurant with neon OPEN signs

agents.ego_description: rounding the street corner at the NCPS building, passing by an outdoor cafe seating area with patrons

notable_agents.action: boxy military-style SUV driving along the street with red taillights illuminated
person sitting at outdoor cafe table under green neon OPEN sign

entered.detail: tables and chairs arranged on sidewalk with green neon OPEN signs in windows behind
tall palm tree visible on the street median ahead
large illuminated abstract geometric sign mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character rounds the corner of the NCPS building, transitioning from the dense urban canyon to a slightly more open street corner. An outdoor cafe with green neon OPEN signs occupies the right side, where patrons sit at tables. A futuristic SUV drives past on the left, and a large geometric neon sign becomes visible on a building ahead. Palm trees line the street median, adding sparse vegetation to the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under building overhang transitioning to darker side street

events.description: entering darker area under building overhang with reduced ambient light
turning into narrower side street with enclosed feeling and less neon illumination

agents.ego_description: turning off the main avenue into a darker side street, passing under a building overhang and encountering a pedestrian walking the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person walking in opposite direction under the building overhang

entered.detail: concrete building overhang creating a covered walkway with reduced lighting
illuminated advertisement billboard featuring cybernetic hand imagery and CYBERPUNK text
distant blue neon sign reading CRYSTAL visible down the dark street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a darker, narrower street, passing under a building overhang that creates a sheltered walkway. The lighting drops significantly compared to the main avenue, with only sparse artificial illumination. A billboard displaying cybernetic imagery appears on the left, while a blue CRYSTAL neon sign glows in the distance ahead. The character passes another pedestrian walking in the opposite direction under the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit side street approaching intersection with traffic signals

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic light showing green signal
character slows pace while approaching the crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking down the darker side street toward the illuminated intersection ahead, slowing as the crosswalk approaches

notable_agents.action: white sedan waiting at the intersection ahead of the character

entered.detail: traffic signal showing green light suspended over the intersection
marked pedestrian crossing lines at the street intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the darker side street, approaching a well-lit intersection in the distance. The blue CRYSTAL neon sign is now visible to the left as the character moves forward. A traffic light showing green hangs over the intersection where a white sedan waits. The character slows down while approaching the crosswalk markings, with the environment transitioning from the enclosed dark street back to a more open intersection area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from a bright main thoroughfare into a shadowed side street before emerging back into an open intersection. It begins at a vibrant crosswalk marked with green signage, moving past digital billboards and a train station as a futuristic sedan glides by. As the camera advances, the environment tightens into a dense urban canyon of towering skyscrapers and glowing police station signage, before rounding a corner to reveal an outdoor cafe and palm trees lining the street. The scene then shifts abruptly as the character turns left into a darker, narrower alleyway under a building overhang, where the brilliant city lights fade into sparse artificial illumination and a distant blue neon sign. Finally, the camera moves forward through this sheltered passage, gradually transitioning from the enclosed darkness back toward the bright lights and green traffic signals of a distant, open intersection.
